title: Mudhal Murai Lyrics Sangamam
stanzas:
Mudhal murai killi paarthen
mudhal murai kannil verthaen
endhan thaayin karbam thaandi
marumurai uyir konden
unnaal irumurai uyir konden(2)

mudhal murai enakku
azhuhida thondrum
yaen......
kanneer undu
sogam illai ..aamaam
mazhai undu megamillai.

salangaigal anindhum
saththangalai maraithaai
penne un ullam thannai
oliththathenna..

vidhai ondru uyir kolla
veppam kaatru eeram vendum
kadhal vandhu uyir kolla
kaalam kooda vaendum.

oru vidhai uyir kondathu
aanaal iru nenjil
vaerkondathu

mozhi ellaam oomai aanaal
kanneer uraiyaadum adhil
kavidhai arangaerum.

Padhaiyin thooram
naan oru baaram
ennai unnellai varai
kondu selvaayaa

udalukkul irukkum
uyir oru sumaiyaa
penne.. unnai naanum
vittu selvaenaa..

thanthai thantha uyir thandthen
thaai thandha udal thanthen
uravugal ellaa serththu
unnidam kanden

seo.title: Mudhal Murai Lyrics Sangamam

seo.keywords: Sangamam, AR Rahman, Srinivas, Sujatha Mohan, Mudhal Murai full lyrics, Sangamam songs lyrics, Mudhal Murai lyrics snippets, Mudhal Murai WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Mudhal Murai lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Mudhal Murai?

The song Mudhal Murai expresses themes of love and emotional connection, reflecting the beauty of first love.

In which movie is Mudhal Murai featured?

Mudhal Murai is featured in the movie Sangamam, which revolves around the world of dance and relationships.

Who are the singers of Mudhal Murai?

The song is sung by Srinivas and Sujatha Mohan, both renowned for their melodious voices.

Who composed the music for Sangamam?

The music for Sangamam was composed by the legendary AR Rahman, known for his innovative soundscapes.

When was Mudhal Murai released?

Mudhal Murai was released on July 16, 1999, and has since become a beloved classic.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mudhal Murai, the singers Srinivas and Sujatha Mohan deliver a heartfelt performance that encapsulates the emotions of first love. The song's soothing melody, crafted by AR Rahman, complements the poignant lyrics that speak of longing and connection. Set against the backdrop of Sangamam, this track highlights the beauty of relationships and the bittersweet nature of love. It evokes a sense of nostalgia, making it a perfect choice for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mudhal Murai from Sangamam is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Srinivas and Sujatha Mohan, paired with AR Rahman's magical composition, this song takes listeners on an emotional journey. Experience the soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics that make this track a timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: I saw the first bird, and in my first sight, I felt my mother's pain. I crossed that pain and found life, and you gave me another life.
The first sight makes me want to cry... There are tears, but no sorrow. Yes, there is rain, but no clouds.
I stole the love that was lying in my feet, and I locked it in my heart.
You hid the feelings and covered the truths, girl, what did you reveal about your heart?
One seed needs warmth to grow, the wind needs moisture. Love must come to give life, and time is also needed.
One seed gives life, but it grows in two hearts.
Speak softly, and sing a song with silence.
Words may be silent, but tears can speak, and within them, poetry can emerge.
On this path, I carry a burden, will you take me to your place?
The life within the body is a comfort, girl... should I also leave you?
The life given by the father, the body given by the mother, all connections brought me to you.
You gave everything, and you are the reason for my days.
